output.summary: MLP-3x with STE int6 QAT, mixed quantization, tuned Muon and sliding-window eval, plus a val-only variant using the same architecture.
output.valOnlyReasoning: CombinedOptimal submission explicitly trains on the validation shard per organizer-approved val-only regime.
techniques: MLP-3x + tuned Muon optimizer (momentum 0.99, LR 0.02, warmdown 3k, seq_len 4096)
STE fake-int6 QAT plus mixed int6/int8 post-training quantization
Sliding-window evaluation (stride 64) with shared architecture for val-only and standard runs
